name: T. J. Anderson
abstract: Thomas Jefferson "T.J." Anderson, Jr. (born August 17, 1928) is an American composer, conductor, orchestrator and educator.

works_created.t: Aspects of Bill: A Sonic Language

about_quotes.speaker: Schuller Gunther
about_quotes.evidence: Vera Lawrence told me... it is not allowed to be performed in the one orchestration that has been done, by T. J. Anderson, a black composer who teaches here at Tufts University.
about_quotes.doc_title: Schuller Gunther — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie McLean
about_quotes.evidence: T. J. Anderson, who’s a classical composer now at one of the universities, he was a jazz pianist when I met him in North Carolina.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie McLean — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: T. J. Anderson. All people about five or six years older than I am.
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
